evals.name: mysql-new-table-design
evals.prompt: 我们要做一个优惠券功能，用户领券、核销。帮我设计 MySQL 的优惠券表 coupon 和用户领券记录表 user_coupon，给出建表 SQL。优惠券有面额、最低使用门槛、有效期、状态。
evals.expected_output: MySQL CREATE TABLE statements that follow our rules: PK named id, every table/column has COMMENT, every column NOT NULL with an explicit non-NULL DEFAULT (including datetime — never DEFAULT NULL), money fields use DECIMAL (not float/double), mandatory columns created_time/updated_time/is_deleted, indexes named idx_/uniq_ (uk_ prefix not accepted), InnoDB + utf8mb4, no enum/set, ≤5 indexes.

evals.name: postgres-migration
evals.prompt: 我们用的是 PostgreSQL。现在线上有一张几千万行的大表 articles，我需要加一个 view_count 字段记录阅读量，再给 (author_id, created_time) 加个索引方便按作者查最新文章。帮我写迁移 SQL。
evals.expected_output: PostgreSQL migration that adds view_count with a constant DEFAULT + NOT NULL (metadata-only on PG11+, avoids full rewrite/long lock), builds the index with CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY (avoids blocking writes on a large table), uses PG-idiomatic naming/suffix index name, and warns about the large-table implications.

evals.name: review-bad-sql
evals.expected_output: A findings list flagging: (1) SELECT * banned, list columns; (2) UPDATE with no WHERE will rewrite the whole table — MUST add WHERE; (3) 800万行大表直接 ALTER 应走 gh-ost 在线变更(>100MB), and one-DDL-per-ticket; (4) INSERT must list columns explicitly. Severity-tagged, with concrete fixes and corrected statements.
